summary: Typography consistency testing for United Rehabs website. ALL typography fixes verified working. FAQ questions now properly display at text-base (16px) instead of oversized h3 sizes. Global heading styles correctly placed inside @layer base allowing Tailwind utilities to override. Previous 'Get Help Now' button bug FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: index.css: Typography styles correctly inside @layer base (lines 13-71) - heading styles only set weight/spacing/line-height, NO font-size declarations
accordion.tsx: AccordionTrigger correctly has text-base class (line 25) - ensures FAQ questions display at 16px
Header.tsx & Footer.tsx: Get Help Now buttons now have onClick={() => window.location.href = 'tel:988'} - previous bug fixed

faq_section.details: All FAQ accordion questions display at 16px (text-base) - no oversized h3 sizes

hero_section.details: H1 displays at 60px on desktop (text-4xl/sm:text-5xl/lg:text-6xl responsive)

font_family_verification.family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif

context_for_next_testing_agent: Typography fix verified working across all pages. FAQ accordion questions now display at proper 16px size. The key fix was: 1) Moving global heading styles into @layer base in index.css, 2) Removing font-size declarations from base heading styles, 3) Adding explicit text-base to AccordionTrigger. Get Help Now buttons now functional with tel:988 handler.
